content.en:
In the center of the purple light world, on an inconspicuous mountain peak, there is a red spirit grass, which looks very extraordinary.

Wow!

A figure suddenly appeared here, its aura was extremely powerful, and it had reached the peak of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and it was not an ordinary Heavenly Mandate Peak Heavenly Monarch, although it could not enter the Heavenly Monarch List, but its strength was also very strong, enough to rank within 10,000 Heavenly Monarchs of the Great Universe.

He has a title, called Zongguang Tianjun, and he has luckily practiced a Zongguang Great Divine Power, which is very famous, and he is good at escaping, extremely fast, and can easily use the Zongguang Great Divine Power to escape when encountering dangerous things.

Because of this, after he entered the Purple Light World, he didn't think about his own safety at all, feeling that even if he encountered some terrifying purple light creatures in the Purple Light World, he would be able to escape safely.

"Purple Grass, good luck, this is a well-known spirit grass in the Purple Light World, it can refine the soul, enough to increase my soul strength by one percent!"

However, he carefully probed the surroundings and found no danger, so he came to the top of the mountain and carefully plucked the hydrangea plant.

But at this moment, a desperate crisis came.

Bang!!!!

The earth cracked, and purple insects appeared, instantly all over the void.

These purple insects are all in the Heavenly Mandate Realm, some are only weaker in the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and even the six or seven star gods can't beat them, but some of them have reached the top Heavenly Monarch ranks.

If it was just like this, Zongguang Heavenly Monarch would not be afraid, after all, with his strength, it was enough to kill a group of Heavenly Mandate peak powerhouses in seconds.

But the group of purple insects that appeared next was extremely terrifying, and its aura had reached the level of a half-step True Monarch, even if it did not enter the Heavenly Monarch List, there were too many of them.

"Run!"

In the midst of great panic, the Heavenly Monarch of Longitudinal Light exerted his great power of Zongguang with all his might, and turned into a longitudinal light and was about to flee.

But at this moment, a stream of purple light shrouded the void, imprisoning this place, causing the speed of the Celestial Monarch to drop significantly, and the terrifying purple light invaded his body, causing his body to be severely damaged.

In the next moment, a large number of purple insects surrounded the Celestial Monarch, devouring his flesh and blood.

Boom Boom Boom !!

Zongguang Tianjun shot with all his strength and used various means, although he killed many purple insects, but in the end he was surrounded and killed by those powerful purple insects.

Soon.

These purple bugs surged in all directions, killing all creatures in sight.

......

"Wanfa Daozi, leave the Purple Light World quickly!"

Peng Yu Tianjun sent a message.

After Ye Tian got the news, he didn't prepare to ask anything, but left the purple light world in an instant.

He knew that Peng Yu Tianjun would not interrogate for no reason, and something big must have happened, so leaving as soon as possible was the right choice, rather than looking for the root cause.

Even if the news is wrong, he has nothing to lose.

Outside the purple light world.

A group of gods and heavenly monarchs gathered here, usually there were not many people here, most of them were in the purple light world, and now these people have come out, and they are very panicked.

As more and more people came out of the purple light world and continued to discuss, Ye Tian gradually learned the truth of the matter even if he didn't ask Peng Yu Tianjun.

"Purple Spirit Golden Worm!"

This is a special purple light creature in the purple light world, a single purple spirit gold worm is not a threat, but the key is that there are too many purple spirit gold worms, and the dense purple spirit gold worms rushed out of the core area of the purple light world, attacking these gods and heavenly monarchs everywhere, even the heavenly monarch can't compete with so many purple spirit golden insects, so he can only flee away.

If you are surrounded by the Purple Spirit Golden Worm, you will soon be eroded by the Purple Spirit Golden Worm with purple light, and you will not be able to escape at that time.

At present, the god general level has basically not fallen, because the god general level is basically on the periphery of the purple light world, while some heavenly monarchs in the core area are unlucky and fall and die one by one.

Whoa!!

A powerhouse quickly left the area where the Purple Light World was located, lest the Purple Spirit Golden Worm rush out of the Purple Light World, in that case, it would be a disaster for the creatures in this area.

Therefore, they did not dare to approach the Purple Light World.

Ye Tian also retreated far away, and he was also worried that something would go wrong.

After a while, Ye Tian saw Peng Yu Tianjun, the other party was a little embarrassed, obviously he had encountered the Purple Spirit Golden Worm, but he was not injured.

Pengyu Tianjun is powerful and has a transcendent speed, as long as he is not surrounded by too many powerful Purple Spirit Golden Worms, he will naturally be fine, but he does not dare to continue to stay in the Purple Light World.

Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch returned to the side of the disciples of the Void Heaven Hall and stood not far from Ye Tian.

Ye Tian went over and asked, "Senior Brother Pengyu, how is the situation?"

Peng Yu Tianjun's face was heavy, and he said: "It's very troublesome, there are a lot of purple spirit golden insects, and they are basically purple spirit golden insects in the Heavenly Mandate realm, some powerful purple spirit golden insects have even reached the half-step true spirit realm, and the true spirit is known as the true monarch, and the strength far exceeds that of the heavenly monarch." These purple spirit golden insects are not very intelligent, and they have not condensed their own true spirits, but they have reached the physical body of the true spirit realm with their physical bodies, so they are considered very powerful half-step true spirits, and a single half-step true spirit purple spirit golden worm is not as good as the Heavenly Monarch Ranking Heavenly Monarch, but it is also comparable to the powerful top Heavenly Monarch. And there are so many that even if I were surrounded, I wouldn't dare to say that I would be able to escape. At present, it is estimated that no one dares to enter the purple light world. Moreover, it is not certain whether the Purple Spirit Golden Worm can break out of the Purple Light World. "

Suddenly, Peng Yu Tianjun took out the corpse of a creature, which was from the Purple Spirit Golden Insect, and its aura was extremely powerful, making Ye Tiandu's heart tremble.

"This is the corpse of a Purple Spirit Golden Worm at the peak of Destiny!"

Pengyu Tianjun said.

Everyone else was amazed at the power of the Purple Spirit Golden Insect, but Ye Tian used his copying talent to check on the Purple Spirit Golden Insect, and he was immediately shocked at this look.

The other talents of the Purple Spirit Golden Worm are similar to those of other living beings, all of them are talents such as strength, speed, and defense, but they also have two special talents, which are talents that Ye Tian has never seen before.

【Purple Light Talent: God Level】

【Purple Armor Talent: God-level】

These are two kinds of talents that are closely related to the purple light world, and the purple spirit golden worm can release a purple light to attack the enemy, which is estimated to be a god-level purple light talent, and the purple armor talent should be a special defense talent.

Immediately, Ye Tian copied the god-level purple light talent and the god-level purple armor talent, he felt that these two talents should help him a lot, they could allow him to survive well in the purple light world, and even expected to help him go deep into the purple light world.

After copying these two talents, Ye Tian took the opportunity to leave this area, and the others also left, for fear of being attacked by the Purple Spirit Golden Worm.
